svg.style: background: #ffffff; background-color: light-dark(#ffffff, var(--ge-dark-color, #121212)); color-scheme: light dark;

<mxfile host="app.diagrams.net" agent="Mozilla/5.0 (X11; Linux x86_64; rv:140.0) Gecko/20100101 Firefox/140.0" version="29.6.3" scale="1" border="0"> <diagram name="Page-1" id="xEZcpYIvX_JcosYJvd2C"> <mxGraphModel dx="2212" dy="1240" grid="1" gridSize="10" guides="1" tooltips="1" connect="1" arrows="1" fold="1" page="1" pageScale="1" pageWidth="850" pageHeight="1100" math="0" shadow="0"> <root> <mxCell id="0" /> <mxCell id="1" parent="0" /> <mxCell id="inet" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#f5f5f5;strokeColor=#666666;fontColor=#333333;fontSize=12;fontStyle=1;arcSize=8;" value="Internet / WAN" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="52" width="200" x="430" y="40" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="hp-perim" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffe6cc;strokeColor=#d79b00;fontColor=#6d3b00;fontSize=11;fontStyle=1;dashed=1;arcSize=8;" value="⚠ honeypot — perimeter
decoy exposed to internet" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="52" width="200" x="710" y="140" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e-inet-hp" edge="1" parent="1" source="inet" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;dashed=1;strokeColor=#d79b00;strokeWidth=1.5;endArrow=open;endFill=0;" target="hp-perim"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="ext-fw" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#f8cecc;strokeColor=#b85450;fontColor=#6d1f1f;fontSize=11;fontStyle=1;arcSize=8;" value="ext-firewall
allows 80, 443, 25, 587, 993" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="52" width="240" x="405" y="140" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e-inet-fw" edge="1" parent="1" source="inet" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;strokeColor=#555555;strokeWidth=2;endArrow=block;endFill=1;" target="ext-fw"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="dmz" parent="1" style="swimlane;startSize=28;fillColor=#fff2cc;strokeColor=#d6b656;fontColor=#333333;fontSize=12;fontStyle=1;rounded=1;arcSize=4;" value="DMZ — 10.10.0.0/24" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="160" width="840" x="160" y="250" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="web" parent="dmz" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#fff2cc;strokeColor=#d6b656;fontColor=#333333;fontSize=11;fontStyle=1;arcSize=6;" value="web-server
nginx · 10.10.0.10 · :80/:443" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="56" width="210" x="50" y="58" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="mail" parent="dmz" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#fff2cc;strokeColor=#d6b656;fontColor=#333333;fontSize=11;fontStyle=1;arcSize=6;" value="mail-server
